original_image_tags: A pinkish paper card with two hole-punch marks at the top. Centered on the card is a blue ink stamp with the text shown above. The top edge of the card is cut at an angle. Faint, illegible pencil writing is visible at the bottom left corner.

elements.description: One blue ink stamp reading 'RECEIVED TELETYPE UNIT / JUN 30 1 31 PM '50 / F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. Two punch holes are visible at the top of the page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a blue ink stamp with specific text, a pinkish card/page, two hole-punch marks, and the general location and nature of these visual elements, with no contradictions on the quoted stamp text or object counts.
